summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. Six PRs had hydrated live PR state and are kept independently because this shard is not a dedupe cluster and merge/fix/close actions are blocked or unsupported by available preflight. Two unavailable refs carry security-shaped token/auth-boundary evidence and are routed to central security handling. Remaining unavailable refs need rehydration before any PR classification or mutation-safe decision.
